chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.47 of 2020 Muzzamil Ashraf Versus Muhamamd Naeem & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA 1746/20 Dated: 25.10.2023 None present for the appellant. Respondent No.1 present in person. Mr. Sandeep Mallani, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Since last few dates appellant and his counsel are not regular and punctual in appearance. They were called absent on 11.09.2023 and 10.10.2023. On the last date appellant was cautioned that in case no one appears on the next date, it shall be dismissed for non-prosecution. Today yet again appellant and his counsel are called absent. There is no intimation either. It appears that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
